title: Real-time self-supervised denoising for high-speed fluorescence neural imaging.
author: Wang Y Gu Y Wang J Xuan A Kong C Fang WQ Li D Zhu D Ding F Dong B
content: S-EPMC12552699 PMC12552699 Real-time self-supervised denoising for high-speed fluorescence neural imaging. Self-supervised denoising methods significantly enhance the signal-to-noise ratio in fluorescence neural imaging, yet real-time solutions remain scarce in high-speed applications. Here, we
